name: Lose Fat
title: Lose Fat
description: Lean protein, lower-sugar snacks, and structured meal plans for a lighter routine.
approach: Prioritize lean protein at each meal, choose lower-sugar snacks, and keep meal planning simple enough to repeat.

name: Build Muscle
title: Build Muscle
description: Whey, mass gainers, fresh protein, and high-protein meals for strength and size.
approach: Build your day around enough total protein, recover well after training, and use convenient snacks to avoid missed meals.

name: Stay Fit
title: Stay Fit
description: Balanced daily protein, snacks, and meal support for consistency.
approach: Keep protein easy and consistent: a daily shake, a smart snack, and balanced meals you can repeat.

name: Vegan Lifestyle
title: Vegan Lifestyle
description: Plant-powered powders, snacks, and meal plans for vegan protein goals.
approach: Combine plant protein powders with vegan snacks and meal plans to make daily protein intake simpler.

name: Busy Professional
title: Busy Professional
description: Ready meals, snacks, and convenient protein options for packed schedules.
approach: Use prepared meals and portable snacks so workdays do not interrupt your nutrition routine.

name: Athlete Recovery
title: Athlete Recovery
description: Recovery-focused whey, fresh proteins, and post-workout nutrition.
approach: Recover with high-quality protein after training, keep fresh proteins ready, and support performance with consistent meals.
